hero.title:
Stop the chaos.
Take control.
hero.subtitle: Workouts, nutrition, labs, measurements, protocols — all in one place. No screenshots. No confusion. One dashboard for your real progress.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title:
Everything scattered
across different apps.
problem.subtitle: Workouts in one app, nutrition in another, labs in email PDFs, measurements in photos. Your history? Nowhere. You never know if you're really making progress.

solution.label: The Real Solution
solution.title:
Centralizing everything
changes how you see progress.
solution.subtitle: Atlas Core isn't another app. It's the operating system that brings together training, nutrition, labs, measurements, and protocols in one view. Real history. Real context. Data that actually matters.

dashboard.title: Your entire dashboard
dashboard.desc: One place to see today's priorities: upcoming workout, next meal, active protocols, important alerts. No switching between 5 apps.

data.title: Real progress data
data.desc: See exactly how well you're following your plan — diet, training, measurements, labs. No guessing. No assumptions. Cold data that tells the truth.

score.title: Real adherence score
score.desc: Daily rating based on workouts completed, meals logged, sleep, hydration. You see where you're slipping and fix it. Not gamification — real feedback.

trends.title: Progress visible in charts
trends.desc: Weight, body fat, measurements, strength — all in charts showing trends. You see changes you wouldn't notice day-to-day.

ai.title: AI that understands your context
ai.desc: Atlas AI reads your actual workouts, meals, labs, history. No generic assumptions — insights based on YOUR real data.

team.title: Your coach/doctor in the loop
team.desc: Share your data with anyone. Coach sees real adherence. Doctor sees lab history. No WhatsApp. No screenshots. No confusion.

forWho.label: For Whom
forWho.title:
Built for people who want
data-driven progress.
forWho.subtitle: If you measure by data, not feeling. If you want to know exactly what works.

athlete.title: Athlete & enthusiast
athlete.desc: You train consistently, nail your diet, check your labs. But it's all scattered. Atlas Core brings it together.

coach.title: Coach & trainer
coach.desc: You manage multiple athletes. You need to track adherence, prescribe training, and see progress without relying on screenshots.

nutritionist.title: Nutritionist
nutritionist.desc: You coach clients through nutrition. View meals, measurements, photos, and create meal plans with AI or manually.

clinician.title: Doctor & clinician
clinician.desc: You prescribe protocols and need data to make decisions. Labs, measurements, and usage history all in one place.

system.title:
Not just workouts.
A complete system.

items.after: AI powered by your real data

pricing.label: Plans
pricing.title:
Start free,
upgrade when ready.
pricing.subtitle: No credit card. No commitment. 7 free days on paid plans. Cancel anytime.

items.q: Does Atlas Core replace my coach or nutritionist?
items.a: No. Atlas Core organizes your data and makes working with professionals easier — it doesn't replace them. Actually, it works best with a coach or doctor on your team. You both see the same data. No screenshots needed.

items.q: Can I use it with my coach, nutritionist, and doctor at once?
items.a: Absolutely. Atlas Core is built for this. Each professional sees only what you allow them to see. Everyone views your real history together.

items.q: What's included in the Free plan?
items.a: Complete workout + nutrition logging, measurement tracking, daily check-ins, 30 days of history, profile and settings. Free never expires — it's yours to start.
AI-powered meal + workout generation, full Atlas AI access, complete lab tracking, unlimited progress photos, 1 year history, advanced analytics, and PDF/CSV exports.
Everything in Pro, plus intelligent protocol tracking with half-life curves, stock alerts, premium reports, deep dashboards, and unlimited history. For complete control.
100%. Atlas Core is fully responsive and optimized for iOS and Android. Same experience logging and tracking on your phone as desktop.
Yes. Export PDF reports (with summary, metrics, measurements, labs) or CSV spreadsheets on Pro and up. Your data is yours.
Yes. No commitment, no cancellation fees. Cancel in one click. But most people stay once they see their real data trending.

items.q: Does the AI create workouts and meals automatically?
items.a: Yes, on Pro and up. Give it your data (goals, weight, activity, preferences) and Atlas AI generates a starter plan. You refine it, your coach refines it — AI learns from real context.

items.q: What if I already have a plan from my coach?
items.a: Perfect. Log it into Atlas Core, mark it as prescribed, and track your adherence vs. the plan. Your coach sees everything and adjusts when needed.

items.q: How does Atlas AI know me?
items.a: It reads your real data: logged workouts, meals, measurements, labs, active protocols. No guessing. That's why the insights are actually useful and contextual.

cta.title:
You can actually
see your progress.
cta.subtitle: Create your account free. In 2 minutes, your first dashboard is ready.
cta.noCard: No credit card · No commitment · Free history forever
